headline: Trump may shift from leadership to regime change if midterms slip: strategist
summary: Investing.com-- Markets are now caught between two competing paths for the Iran conflict—near-term de-escalation or a deeper, more damaging escalation—with political incentives in Washington playing a key role, according to BCA’s chief geopolitical strategist Matt Gertken. Gertken said he is not “stubborn or dogmatic” about how the conflict ends, but argues that recent developments do not support hopes for a quick ceasefire.
